title: clematis × boweri
intro: Clematis × boweri, also known as the Bower's Clematis, is a hybrid clematis plant that is native to China. The plant's roots and leaves have been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Clematis × boweri include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
